name: greenapple
description: Native desktop location and route controller for connected developer devices.

scripts.build:native: npm run build:web && dotnet build winhost\Greenapple.Native.csproj -c Release
scripts.publish:native: npm run build:web && dotnet publish winhost\Greenapple.Native.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:IncludeNativeLibrariesForSelfExtract=true -o ..\..\outputs\Greenapple-Native-WebView2
